examples: She always has cravings for chocolate.
I've been craving Korean food all week.
context: I've been craving bread like crazy. I just want a sandwich or any kind of carve like a big bowl of noodles. I think when the challenge is finished, my first meal will be a big bowl of sujebi.

examples: I was struggling to keep up with the pace.
Many students are struggling with math.
She's been struggling financially this year.
context: What I've been struggling with the most during the 75-hard challenge has been my diet. I set super strict rules for my diet. For 75 days, I cannot eat any take-out food or delivery food, and I can't eat out at restaurants. So every meal must be cooked at home. I'm also not eating gluten or sugar, so my diet is quite restricted these days. I enjoy cooking, but having to cook every single meal has been pretty exhausting. I really miss coupon eats, especially on days where I'm a little bit busier. Tonight, I made beef stew. I also make a lot of salads like chicken salad. I eat eggs almost every morning for breakfast, and now that the weather is getting hotter, I'll start making my favorite smoothie bowls for breakfast soon. That's a staple for me in the summer.
I've been really struggling with it lately and I cannot wait for it to be finished.
